source: POH PSM 1-63-1A Section 1.5.3 and Section 6; HBFO-002 QRH ISS01REV02 Section 11

tanks.label: Forward Tank (FWD)
tanks.note: 99% usable. Unusable fuel = 23 lb total across both tanks combined.

tanks.label: Rear Tank (AFT)
tanks.note: Slightly larger than forward tank. Feeds left engine in NORM position.

fuel.crossfeed_note: Cannot transfer fuel between tanks. Crossfeed only — both engines from one tank.
fuel.fuel_reserve_note: 45-minute reserve at holding speed/altitude is the minimum legal reserve.

burn_rates.note: From POH Section 10: 240 lb/eng/hr at 10,000 ft, no wind, starting calculation point.

weight_and_balance.datum_description: 109.32 inches forward of the fuselage jig points
weight_and_balance.qrh_datum_description: 60 inches forward of front fuselage bulkhead (QRH OM-B 11.1)

cg_limits.note: QRH OM-B 11.1 simplified limits (seaplane operation). Verify full POH Figure 6-15 for all configurations.
cg_limits.applies_to: Take-off and landing, all weights — simplified QRH limits

standard_weights_lb.note: Standard crew and passenger weights. Use operator-specific values if available.

standard_arm_in.note: Approximate arms based on POH Figure 6-5 balance diagram. Use actual aircraft-specific W&B forms for dispatch.
